query: Finlandia-hiihto cross country ski race Lahti

videos.title: Finlandia Ski Marathon (Finlandia-hiihto) 2016 - 32 km
videos.description: Start of Finlandia Ski Marathon 2016 classic 32 km. Why not participate as a skier or spectator in 2017 and stay a week in Lahti, Finland, for activity holidays with My Finland? This is a race for all skier levels - if you think 32 km is not too much - or too little :) . Book with My Finland ! Demande d'offre avev My Finland : www.myfinland.info .

videos.title: Finlandia-hiihto - 7th February 2026
videos.description:
This year I wanted to do things differently, to break my own traditions. That's why I filmed only the first starting group at the stadium.
 
It was a rather cold day. The lowest temperature was about -20 C (-4 F).

videos.title: Finlandia-hiihto 2024: 62 km classic (POV)
videos.description:
Full 62 km course of Finlandia-hiihto 24.2.2024 with classic style and 9.20 start (starting group 3).

Finlandia-hiihto (Finlandia Ski Marathon) is a long-distance cross-country skiing competition held in Finland each February.
From 2001 onwards, the Finlandia-hiihto has been raced on a course that takes the competitors from Lahti to Hollola and back.
In 2011, Finlandia-hiihto became a part of the FIS Marathon Cup series.
Finlandia-hiihto is one of the events forming the Worldloppet (WL).
https://www.finlandiahiihto.fi/
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Finlandia-hiihto
https://www.worldloppet.com/

Video chapters and service stations:
00:00 Start
00:47:53 Messilä 10,5 km
01:31:51 Hälvälä 19 km
02:15:35 Orinkarkaus 28 km
03:08:14 Papinkaivo 38,5 km
04:08:00 Heinsuo 50,4 km
04:45:15 Tapanila 57,4 km

Technical details: 
Temperature from 0 to 2 °C with humidity 92-100 %
Video with GoPro Hero11 Black 1080p 30fps SuperView Hypersmooth and three Enduro batteries
Maps with 2d.routegadget.net (Finland NLS bgmap & rotatable blank background)
Editing with Shotcut version 24.02.29 https://www.shotcut.org/
Transportation and carb loading with the generous help of Tommi and Elina

videos.title: 🎿 Finlandia Hiihto 2025 – 66 km Skiing Adventure in Lahti | 4K First-Person View + Drone Footage ❄️
videos.description:
Welcome to an unforgettable skiing experience at Finlandia Hiihto 2025! 🎿❄️ This 4K video takes you through the 66 km race in Lahti, Finland, capturing the full journey from a first-person perspective (FPV). Enjoy the stunning winter scenery and feel the challenge of this legendary ski marathon!

🌲 What’s in the video?

First-Person View (FPV): Experience the full race through the skier's eyes, from start to finish. See the trails, feel the effort, and immerse yourself in the race.
Drone Footage: Stunning aerial shots from the starting area and key checkpoints along the course, showcasing the scale of the event and the beauty of the snowy landscape.
📍 Route & Performance:
The skier completes the 66 km course in 6 hours and 30 minutes, giving a realistic insight into the endurance and technique required for this epic ski marathon.

🏁 Checkpoint Highlights:
Follow along as we stop at multiple aid stations along the course, where skiers refuel and prepare for the next stage of the journey. These key locations bring energy and excitement to the race!

❄️ Weather Conditions:
A crisp, clear winter day provides perfect skiing conditions, highlighting the beautiful Finnish nature without direct sunlight interfering with the view.

Join us on this iconic cross-country ski adventure and experience the thrill of Finlandia Hiihto like never before!

🔔 Subscribe for more outdoor sports and adventure videos!

#FinlandiaHiihto2025 #LahtiFinland #CrossCountrySkiing #4KFPV #SkiMarathon #DroneFootage #WinterSports #SkiingAdventure #ScenicViews #EnduranceSports

videos.title: The Best Moments of Finlandia Ski Marathon Classic 2025
videos.description:
The Best Moments of Finlandia Ski Marathon Classic 2025

Video Credits: Anton Floor/Finlandia Ski Marathon

videos.title: Finlandia-hiihto - 22nd February 2025
videos.description: As always, the first race day of the weekend was skied with a classic style. The longest route was 62 km (38.5 miles) long. All starting groups and some moments from finish line are shown in this video.

videos.title: Finlandia-hiihto - 24th February 2024 - Start
videos.description: The first race day of the weekend was skied with a classic style in a somewhat foggy weather. The longest route was 62 km (38.5 miles) long. All starting groups are included in this video.

videos.title: Finlandia-hiihto - 25th February 2023 - Start
videos.description: This year is 50th anniversary for Finlandia-hiihto. The first race day of the weekend was skied with a classic style. The longest route was 58 km (36 miles) long.
